/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++  --offload-arch=gfx90a --offload-arch=gfx1100 --hip-link --rtlib=compiler-rt -unwindlib=libgcc -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bench_fused_rmsnorm_matmul.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bench_fused_rmsnorm_matmul.dir/benchmarks/bench_fused_rmsnorm_matmul.cu.o -o bench_fused_rmsnorm_matmul  /opt/rocm-7.2.1/lib/libhipblas.so.3.2.70201 /opt/rocm/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.2.70201 /opt/rocm/lib/libhipblaslt.so.1.2.70201 /opt/rocm-7.2.1/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.2.70201
